eea5fbdf-16a8-6f03-f08b-62b244600b22.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id

widgets.description: The CPU utilization of the Azure Redis Cache server as a percentage.
widgets.title: CPU

widgets.description: The percentage of cycles in which the Redis server is busy processing and not waiting idle.
widgets.title: Server Load

widgets.description: The amount of cache memory used for key/value pairs.
widgets.title: Used Memory

widgets.description: The percentage of cache memory used for key/value pairs.
widgets.title: Used Memory Percentage

widgets.description: The number of client connections to the cache.
widgets.title: Connected Clients

widgets.description: The number of instantaneous operations per second executed on the cache.
widgets.title: Operations Per Second

widgets.description: The number of successful key lookups.
widgets.title: Cache Hits

widgets.description: The number of failed key lookups.
widgets.title: Cache Misses

widgets.description: The number of items evicted from the cache.
widgets.title: Evicted Keys

widgets.description: The number of items expired from the cache.
widgets.title: Expired Keys

widgets.description: The total number of items in the cache.
widgets.title: Total Keys

widgets.description: The health of geo replication. 0 = Unhealthy, 1 = Healthy.
widgets.title: Geo Replication Healthy
